sub_modules.fir_coeff_pack: Combinational hard-coded 101-tap signed coefficient pack using the exact benchmark coefficients.
sub_modules.fir_symmetric_sum_pack: Combinational symmetric tap pre-adder that pairs mirrored samples and forwards the center tap.
sub_modules.fir_mac_symmetric: Combinational signed multiply-accumulate engine using mirrored tap sums plus the center coefficient.
sub_modules.fir_output_scale: Combinational fixed-point output scaler that arithmetic right-shifts the 64-bit accumulator by 20 bits.
